# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-047](task-0114): Provider Data Retention

## Purpose

Implement provider data retention.

## Scope

- Retention policies
- Deletion
- Archival

## Implementation

1. Define policies
2. Implement deletion
3. Add archival

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Policies defined
2. Deletion works
3. Archival works
